segments.text: A Song of Ascents. Of David.
If the LORD had not been on our side—let Israel say—
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: if the LORD had not been on our side when people attacked us,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: they would have swallowed us alive when their anger flared against us;
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: the flood would have engulfed us, the torrent would have swept over us,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: the raging waters would have swept us away.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Praise be to the LORD, who has not let us be torn by their teeth.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: We have escaped like a bird from the fowler's snare; the snare has been broken, and we have escaped.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Our help is in the name of the LORD, the Maker of heaven and earth.
segments.speaker: David
